contents: Require Import HoTT.Basics HoTT.Types HFiber Limits.Pullback Pointed Truncations.
Require Import HoTT.Basics HoTT.Types HFiber Limits.Pullback Pointed Truncations.

(** * The object classifier *)

(** We prove that type families correspond to fibrations [equiv_sigma_fibration] (Theorem 4.8.3) and the projection [pointed_type : pType -> Type] is an object classifier [ispullback_square_objectclassifier] (Theorem 4.8.4). *)

(** We denote the type of all maps into a type [Y] as follows, and refer to them "bundles over Y". *)
Definition Slice (Y : Type@{u}) := { X : Type@{u} & X -> Y }.
Definition pSlice (Y : pType@{u}) := { X : pType@{u} & X ->* Y }.

Definition sigma_fibration@{u v} {Y : Type@{u}} (P : Y -> Type@{u}) : Slice@{u v} Y
  := (sig@{u u} P; pr1).

Definition sigma_fibration_inverse {Y : Type@{u}} (p : Slice Y) : Y -> Type@{u}
  := hfiber p.2.

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv sigma_fibration
IsEquiv sigma_fibration
Slice Y -> Y -> Type
sigma_fibration o ?g == idmap
?g o sigma_fibration == idmap
Slice Y -> Y -> Type
sigma_fibration o sigma_fibration_inverse == idmap
sigma_fibration (sigma_fibration_inverse (X; p)) = (X; p)
{x : _ & sigma_fibration_inverse (X; p) x} = X
transport (fun X0 : Type => X0 -> Y) ?Goal pr1 = p
{x : _ & sigma_fibration_inverse (X; p) x} = X

transport (fun X0 : Type => X0 -> Y)
  (path_universe (equiv_fibration_replacement (X; p).2)^-1%equiv) pr1 =
p
sigma_fibration_inverse o sigma_fibration == idmap
sigma_fibration_inverse (sigma_fibration P) = P
sigma_fibration_inverse (sigma_fibration P) y = P y

contents:
(** The universal map is the forgetful map [pointed_type : pType -> Type]. *)

(** We construct the universal square for the object classifier. *)

Local Definition topmap {A : Type} (P : A -> Type) (e : sig P) : pType
  := [P e.1, e.2].

Definition objectclassifier_square {A : Type} (P : A -> Type)
  : P o pr1 == pointed_type o (topmap P)
  := fun e : sig P => idpath (P e.1).

Theorem ispullback_objectclassifier_square {A : Type} (P : A -> Type)
  : IsPullback (objectclassifier_square P).

goals.conclusion: IsPullback (objectclassifier_square P)
IsPullback (objectclassifier_square P)
Pullback P pointed_type -> {x : _ & P x}
pullback_corec (objectclassifier_square P) o ?g == idmap
?g o pullback_corec (objectclassifier_square P) == idmap
Pullback P pointed_type -> {x : _ & P x}

pullback_corec (objectclassifier_square P)
o (fun X : Pullback P pointed_type =>
   (fun (a : A) (proj2 : {c : pType & P a = c}) =>
    (fun (F : pType) (p : P a = F) => (a; transport idmap p^ pt)) proj2.1
      proj2.2)
     X.1 X.2) ==
idmap

contents: intros [a [[T t] p]]; cbn in p.

goals.conclusion:
pullback_corec (objectclassifier_square P) (a; transport idmap p^ pt) =
(a; [T, t]; p)

transport (fun b : A => {c : pType & P b = c}) 1
  (topmap P (a; transport idmap p^ pt);
  objectclassifier_square P (a; transport idmap p^ pt)) =
([T, t]; p)

(fun X : Pullback P pointed_type =>
 (fun (a : A) (proj2 : {c : pType & P a = c}) =>
  (fun (F : pType) (p : P a = F) => (a; transport idmap p^ pt)) proj2.1
    proj2.2)
   X.1 X.2)
o pullback_corec (objectclassifier_square P) == idmap

contents:
(** ** Classifying bundles with specified fiber *)

(** Bundles over [B] with fiber [F] correspond to pointed maps into the universe pointed at [F]. *)

Proposition equiv_sigma_fibration_p@{u v +} `{Univalence} {Y : pType@{u}} {F : Type@{u}}
  : (Y ->* [Type@{u}, F]) <~> { p : Slice@{u v} Y & hfiber p.2 (point Y) <~> F }.

goals.conclusion: (Y ->* [Type, F]) <~> {p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}
(Y ->* [Type, F]) <~> {p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}
{f : Y -> [Type, F] & f pt = pt} <~> {p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}
P pt = F <~> (hfiber pr1 pt <~> F)
(P pt <~> F) <~> (hfiber pr1 pt <~> F)
P pt <~> hfiber pr1 pt

contents: (** If the fiber [F] is pointed we may upgrade the right-hand side to pointed fiber sequences. *)

goals.conclusion: {p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F} <~> {p : pSlice Y & pfiber p.2 <~>* F}
{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F} <~> {p : pSlice Y & pfiber p.2 <~>* F}

contents:
equiv_via
    (sig@{v u} (fun X : Type@{u} =>
                  { x : X &
                        { p : X -> Y &
                                  { eq : p x = point Y &
                                         { e : hfiber p (point Y) <~> F
                                               & e^-1 (point F) = (x; eq) } } } })).

goals.conclusion:
{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F} <~>
{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}}

{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}} <~>
{p : pSlice Y & pfiber p.2 <~>* F}

{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F} <~>
{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}}

?Goal0 <~>
{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}}
{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F} <~> ?Goal0

?Goal0 <~>
{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}}

{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F} <~>
{a : Type &
{a0 : a &
{a1 : a -> Y &
{a2 : a1 a0 = pt &
{a3 : hfiber a1 pt <~> F &
{p : (a3^-1 pt).1 = (a0; a2).1 &
transport (fun x : a => a1 x = pt) p (a3^-1 pt).2 = (a0; a2).2}}}}}}

{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}} <~>
{p : pSlice Y & pfiber p.2 <~>* F}
?Goal <~> {p : pSlice Y & pfiber p.2 <~>* F}

{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}} <~>
?Goal

{X : Type &
{x : X &
{p : X -> Y & {eq : p x = pt & {e : hfiber p pt <~> F & e^-1 pt = (x; eq)}}}}} <~>
?Goal

{a : Type &
{a0 : a &
{a1 : a -> Y &
{a2 : a1 a0 = pt & {a3 : hfiber a1 pt <~> F & a3 (a0; a2) = pt}}}}} <~>
{p : pSlice Y & pfiber p.2 <~>* F}

contents:
(** * The classifier for O-local types *)

(** Families of O-local types correspond to bundles with O-local fibers. *)

Theorem equiv_sigma_fibration_O@{u v} `{Univalence} {O : Subuniverse} {Y : Type@{u}}
  : (Y -> Type_@{u v} O) <~> { p : { X : Type@{u} & X -> Y } & MapIn O p.2 }.

goals.conclusion: (Y -> Type_ O) <~> {p : {X : Type & X -> Y} & MapIn O p.2}
(Y -> Type_ O) <~> {p : {X : Type & X -> Y} & MapIn O p.2}

contents: refine (_ oE (equiv_sig_coind@{u v u v v v u} _ _)^-1).

goals.conclusion:
{f : Y -> Type & forall x : Y, In O (f x)} <~>
{p : {X : Type & X -> Y} & MapIn O p.2}

contents: apply (equiv_functor_sigma'@{v u v v v v} equiv_sigma_fibration@{u v}); intro P; cbn.

goals.conclusion: (forall x : Y, In O (P x)) <~> MapIn O pr1

contents:
(** ** Classifying O-local bundles with specified fiber *)

(** We consider a pointed base [Y], and the universe of O-local types [Type_ O] pointed at some O-local type [F]. *)

(** Pointed maps into [Type_ O] correspond to O-local bundles with fiber [F] over the base point of [Y]. *)

goals.conclusion:
(Y ->* [Type_ O, (F; inO)]) <~>
{p : {q : Slice Y & MapIn O q.2} & hfiber (p.1).2 pt <~> F}

(Y ->* [Type_ O, (F; inO)]) <~>
{p : {q : Slice Y & MapIn O q.2} & hfiber (p.1).2 pt <~> F}

{f : Y -> Type_ O & f pt = (F; inO)} <~>
{p : {q : Slice Y & MapIn O q.2} & hfiber (p.1).2 pt <~> F}
P pt = (F; inO) <~> (hfiber pr1 pt <~> F)
(P pt).1 = F <~> (hfiber pr1 pt <~> F)
((P pt).1 <~> F) <~> (hfiber pr1 pt <~> F)
(P pt).1 <~> hfiber pr1 pt

contents: (** When the base [Y] is connected, the fibers being O-local follow from the fact that the fiber [F] over the base point is. *)

goals.conclusion: (Y ->* [Type_ O, (F; inO)]) <~> {p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}
(Y ->* [Type_ O, (F; inO)]) <~> {p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}

{p : {q : Slice Y & MapIn O q.2} & hfiber (p.1).2 pt <~> F} <~>
{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}

contents: refine (_ oE (equiv_sigma_assoc' _ (fun p _ => hfiber p.2 (point Y) <~> F))^-1%equiv).

goals.conclusion:
{a : {X : Type & X -> Y} & {_ : MapIn O a.2 & hfiber a.2 pt <~> F}} <~>
{p : Slice Y & hfiber p.2 pt <~> F}
{_ : MapIn O a.2 & hfiber a.2 pt <~> F} <~> (hfiber a.2 pt <~> F)
{_ : hfiber a.2 pt <~> F & MapIn O a.2} <~> (hfiber a.2 pt <~> F)
Contr (MapIn O a.2)
MapIn O a.2
In O (hfiber a.2 pt)

contents:
(** *** Classifying O-local bundles with specified pointed fiber *)

(** When the fiber [F] is pointed, the right-hand side can be upgraded to pointed fiber sequences with O-local fibers.  *)

Proposition equiv_sigma_pfibration_O `{Univalence} (O : Subuniverse)
            {Y F : pType} `{inO : In O F}
  : (Y ->* [Type_ O, (pointed_type F; inO)])
      <~> { p : { q : pSlice Y & MapIn O q.2 } & pfiber p.1.2 <~>* F }.

goals.conclusion:
(Y ->* [Type_ O, (F; inO)]) <~>
{p : {q : pSlice Y & MapIn O q.2} & pfiber (p.1).2 <~>* F}

(Y ->* [Type_ O, (F; inO)]) <~>
{p : {q : pSlice Y & MapIn O q.2} & pfiber (p.1).2 <~>* F}

{p : {q : Slice Y & MapIn O q.2} & hfiber (p.1).2 pt <~> F} <~>
{p : {q : pSlice Y & MapIn O q.2} & pfiber (p.1).2 <~>* F}

contents: refine (_ oE equiv_sigma_symm' _ (fun q => hfiber q.2 (point Y) <~> F)).

goals.conclusion:
{aq : {a : {X : Type & X -> Y} & hfiber a.2 pt <~> F} & MapIn O (aq.1).2} <~>
{p : {q : pSlice Y & MapIn O q.2} & pfiber (p.1).2 <~>* F}

contents: refine (equiv_sigma_symm' (fun q => pfiber q.2 <~>* F) _ oE _).

goals.conclusion:
{aq : {a : {X : Type & X -> Y} & hfiber a.2 pt <~> F} & MapIn O (aq.1).2} <~>
{ap : {a : {X : pType & X ->* Y} & pfiber a.2 <~>* F} & MapIn O (ap.1).2}

contents: (** When moreover the base [Y] is connected, the right-hand side is exactly the type of pointed fiber sequences, since the fibers being O-local follow from [F] being O-local and [Y] connected. *)
(** As a corollary, pointed maps into the universe of O-local types are just pointed maps into the universe, when the base [Y] is connected. *)
